title: Wakfu
description: A mod on the theme of the anime/ game Wakfu
body:
This mod Minecraft is inspired by the game/anime Wakfu

The mod is in _**1.20.1**_
 
 

 



The mod adds several things like the Haven Bag, The Eliacube, Ruel's shovel, Tofu, the 6 Dofus.....

**Rubilax**:
Rubilax is a sword that has 2 forms
To equip the 2nd form you must crouch and right click
![Rubilax Form 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11b46bf2116af6672a12fc5f30b7b10051b47a60.png)
![Rubilax Form 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/236a85cc8910eb102f2129f9745141bce7ef203c.png)

**The 6 Dofus**:






![6 Dofus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c13a44dd78b2268349003e7f1e868f2a0802c3e7.png)

The villager who exchanges Dofus




![The Villager](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28c282d91827b58d7503e7e1bcadc149696d5f45.png)
